form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 36 day let-up. At the latest run 3rd of 14 at this track on March 1 over 1400m, neck behind Chill Partners carrying 60kg at $10. form.formComment: At the latest run sat behind the speed prior to fading 7th of 12 at Happy Valley on March 25 over 1650m, 3 len behind Beauty Viva carrying 53.5kg at $3.90. Before that favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.0 len at Happy Valley March 4 over 1800m defeating All Are Mine with 58.5kg at $4.20. Hard to fault if at his best.
